info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vyAptAvaSnuta ityAhuraSnAtIti tu Bojane ' iti devaH  (166)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra te aSnotu kukzyoH' (f0 35112) prASnotu prASnutAM vyApnotu
'na nUnaM brahmaRAmfRaM prASUnAmasti sunvatAm' (f0 8516) somaM prASnavate ye te prASavaH
'svADyAyaviDiScoccAraRopayogi prASuBAvaPalakatayEvADyayanaM viDatte' (BA0 dI0 124) prakarzeRASuH prASuH satDarataraH pratUrtaH tasya BAvaH
'dorBiScAtapadIptESca prAsEH prASESca mUrCanEH' (mAtsya0 pu0 17712)
'samaSnute me laGimAnamAtmA' (raGu॰13.37) samaSnute=prApnoti
'…pfcCyamAnA saKIyate saM DItamaSnutaM narA…' (f॰8.40.3).. ito'BimuKamAgacCatam ityAha
'suvargasya lokasya samazwyE' (tE0 saM0 5722) samazwyE prAptyE
'samAnaMSa samatiBiH ko asya' (f0 4232) samAnaMSa samAnaSe saMBeje saMjagme
'imAM vyazwiM vyASnuta' (Sa0 brA0 10248) vyazwiH=AptiH samfdDiH sAPalyam
'prajApatirakAmayata sarvA vyazwIrvyaSnuvIya' (Sa0 brA0 13411) sarvA vyazwIH=sarvAnarTAn
'yadeva hUyamAnasya vyaSnute' (Sa0 brA0 22417) vyaSnute=Sizyate=urvaritaM Bavati
'pratApastasya BAnoSca yugapad vyAnaSe diSaH' (raGu0 415) vyAnaSe=vyApa
'te taM vyASizata' (Bawwi0 1543) vyAptavantaH=parigatavantaH parivezwitavanta ityarTaH
'sa etenEkaSataviDenAtmanemAM jitiM jayatImAM vyazwiM vyaSnute' (Sa0 brA0 10198) vyazwiH PalaM sAPalyam
'ko vo mahAnti mahatAmud aSnavat' (f0 5594) udaSnavat vyaSnavat vyaSnuvIta prApnuyAt aSnavat iti paYcame lakAre rUpam
'viSvA it spfDo aByaSnavAva' (f0 11793) aBiBavevetyarTaH
'tadasya priyamaBi pATo aSyAm' (f0 11545) aByaSyAm prApnuyAm)
'aByASo ha yadasmE sa kAmaH samfDyet yatkAmaH stuvIta' (CAM0 u0 1312) aByASa ASA
'aByASo ha yadasmE sa kAmaH samfDyeta' (CAM0 u0 1312) aByASa ASaMsA
'kAmAdupASnanti sahasraSaste mudAnvitAH' (rA0 612413) upASnanti upaBuYjate upaSabdo DAtvarTasya na bahUpakaroti
'anavyavahitaM yo vA nedaM vAkyamupASnute' (BA0 SAM0 14224) upASnute'NgI karoti
